rationale: Builds directly on the current best quant-aware late-LR path, but spends the remaining 16MB artifact headroom more deliberately. The final save now greedily tests a small ranked set of penultimate attention tensors for FP16 passthrough against the true compressed model budget, so this run can capture extra post-quantization fidelity only when it actually fits. I also removed redundant quantization metadata and an unused float-keep branch to keep the script lean and under the line cap.
title: Budget-Greedy Final FP16 Rescue
